metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for delegating tasks to Cursor CLI and Google Gemini CLI with code review, rescue subagents, and session lifecycle management.

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Cursor CLI (agent) from Claude Code with background jobs, adversarial review, rescue subagent, and stop-time review gate.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Google Gemini CLI from Claude Code with background jobs, adversarial review, rescue subagent, and stop-time review gate.
